background:#5b794e;
color:#ffffff;

::selection {
	background: #5b794e;
	color: #ffffff;
}
body {
	background-color: #ffffff;
	margin: 0;
	padding: 0;
}
.ReadMsgBody {
	width: 100%;
	background-color: #ffffff;
}
.ExternalClass {
	width: 100%;
	background-color: #ffffff;
}
a {
	color: #ffffff;
	text-decoration: none;
	font-weight: 400;
	font-style: normal;
}
a:hover {
	color: #ffffff;
	text-decoration: none;
	font-weight: 400;
	font-style: normal;
}
p, div {
	margin: 0!important;
}
table {
	border-collapse: collapse;
}

@media only screen and (max-width:640px) {
body {
	width: auto!important;
}
table table {
	width: 100%!important;
}
td[class=full_width] {
	width: 100%!important;
}
.reHideMedium {
	display: none !important;
}
.reShowMedium {
	display: block !important;
}
.reCenterMedium {
	text-align: center !important;
}
div[class=div_scale] {
	width: 440px!important;

}
